summary: Pre-Launch Subscription Readiness Check PASSED - All backend APIs working correctly with subscription_provider field support for Apple StoreKit and Google Play Billing. Frontend billing.ts and subscriptionConfig.ts modules verified. ProGate component correctly using 30-day trial period from config.

issues: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings - cosmetic only

subscription_pricing_api.GET /api/subscription/pricing: PASS - Returns monthly ($29) and annual ($276) plans with 30-day trial, features list, and savings ($72)
subscription_pricing_api.plan_structure: PASS - Both monthly and annual plans have id, name, price, currency, period, trial_days, features fields
subscription_pricing_api.mom_features: PASS - Returns list of free mom features

subscription_status_api.GET /api/subscription/status (DOULA): PASS - Returns all required fields: has_pro_access, subscription_status, subscription_provider, auto_renewing, trial_end_date, subscription_end_date, days_remaining
subscription_status_api.GET /api/subscription/status (MIDWIFE): PASS - Returns all required fields correctly

start_trial_api.POST /api/subscription/start-trial: PASS - Requires auth, requires DOULA/MIDWIFE role, accepts subscription_provider (APPLE/GOOGLE/MOCK/WEB)

validate_receipt_api.POST /api/subscription/validate-receipt: PASS - Validates Apple product IDs (truejoy.pro.monthly, truejoy.pro.annual)
validate_receipt_api.google_products: PASS - Validates Google product IDs (truejoy_pro_monthly, truejoy_pro_annual)
validate_receipt_api.invalid_provider: PASS - Rejects invalid providers (only APPLE/GOOGLE accepted)

cancel_subscription_api.POST /api/subscription/cancel: PASS - Returns provider-specific management info (manage_url, manage_instructions)
cancel_subscription_api.apple_management: PASS - Returns App Store subscription URL for APPLE provider
cancel_subscription_api.google_management: PASS - Returns Play Store subscription URL for GOOGLE provider

frontend_files.billing.ts: PASS - Exists at /app/frontend/app/services/billing.ts with placeholder IAP functions for react-native-iap
frontend_files.subscriptionConfig.ts: PASS - Exists at /app/frontend/app/config/subscriptionConfig.ts with correct product IDs and trialDays:30
frontend_files.subscriptionStore.ts: PASS - Exists at /app/frontend/src/store/subscriptionStore.ts with validateReceipt method
frontend_files.ProGate.tsx: PASS - Uses SUBSCRIPTION_CONFIG.trialDays (30) for trial period display
frontend_files.plans-pricing.tsx: PASS - Shows monthly ($29) and annual ($276) options, 30-day free trial button, Save $72 badge

product_ids.apple_monthly: truejoy.pro.monthly - Correct reverse domain notation with dots
product_ids.apple_annual: truejoy.pro.annual - Correct reverse domain notation with dots

critical_code_review_comments: subscription_provider field correctly stored in database for PRO users
validate-receipt endpoint validates product IDs match provider (Apple vs Google)
Cancel endpoint returns provider-specific management URLs
Frontend billing.ts uses MOCKED functions - ready for react-native-iap integration
30-day trial consistently used across backend and frontend config
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Launch Subscription Readiness verified. Backend stores subscription_provider (APPLE/GOOGLE/MOCK/WEB), auto_renewing, and validates product IDs. Frontend has placeholder billing.ts for react-native-iap integration. Product IDs: Apple (truejoy.pro.monthly, truejoy.pro.annual), Google (truejoy_pro_monthly, truejoy_pro_annual). 30-day free trial.

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/subscription/validate-receipt - accepts any receipt, creates subscription without real validation with Apple/Google servers
Frontend billing.ts - all functions are placeholders for react-native-iap
Trial start creates mock subscription without actual payment processing
